data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for detailed preparation instructions.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the presence of detailed preparation instructions, forms link, FAQ, contact info, and weather forecast for outdoor services. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific details or examples demonstrating that these elements are implemented or available. The linked use case mentions the need for these details, but there is no concrete evidence showing that they exist, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of detailed preparation instructions, forms link, FAQ, contact info, or weather forecast.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the presence of detailed preparation instructions and related information.
